# Flowdence Docs

> Official documentation for Flowdence products — ApprovalFlow and MuleSight for Atlassian Confluence Cloud.

## Documentation Structure

This site contains setup guides, feature references, policies, and trust resources for all Flowdence products.

## Products

### ApprovalFlow for Confluence
- Docs: https://docs.flowdence.io/approvalflow/docs/getting-started/
- Product page: https://flowdence.io/products/approvalflow
- Marketplace: https://marketplace.atlassian.com/apps/2350565795/approvalflow-for-confluence
- Description: Structured content approval workflows for Confluence Cloud. Multi-step review processes, version-aware page tracking, workflow analytics, and audit trails.

### MuleSight for Confluence
- Docs: https://docs.flowdence.io/mulesight/docs/getting-started/
- Product page: https://flowdence.io/products/mulesight
- Marketplace: https://marketplace.atlassian.com/apps/970479047/mulesight-for-confluence
- Description: MuleSoft Anypoint visibility in Confluence. Live snapshot macros, environment drift detection, API security posture analysis, and Rovo AI agent.

## Related Resources

- Main site: https://flowdence.io
- Blog: https://blog.flowdence.io
- Support: https://flowdence.io/support
- Trust center: https://flowdence.io/trust
- Sitemap: https://docs.flowdence.io/sitemap-index.xml
